# BaseKit

> The agent skill kit for Base. Five opinionated playbooks + an MCP server
> for shipping onchain. Install in one command. MIT licensed.

Site: https://basekit.dev
Source: https://github.com/basekit/basekit
License: MIT
Maintainer: hello@basekit.dev
Version: 0.1.0

## What this is

BaseKit is a portable bundle for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex,
Windsurf, and any SKILL.md-compatible runtime) that teaches them how to ship on
the Base blockchain. It's two things:

  1. Five SKILL.md playbooks the agent loads on demand.
  2. One MCP server exposing six read-only Base tools (viem under the hood).

Install with: `claude plugin install basekit`
Or via MCP only: `npx -y @basekit/mcp`

## Skills

- base-deploy-token        Deploy an ERC-20 on Base from a single prompt.
- base-analyze-wallet      Profile any address (activity, holdings, risk).
- base-gas-optimize        Audit Solidity for gas waste with prioritized diffs.
- base-airdrop             Merkle drops with sybil filtering and claim contract.
- base-basescan-debug      Decode failed transactions, find the failing frame.

Each skill lives at /skills/<name>/SKILL.md in the repo.

## MCP tools

- get_wallet_profile       Activity + holdings + counterparties for an address.
- get_transaction_trace    Decoded call tree, revert reason, failing frame.
- estimate_token_deploy    Preflight gas/ETH cost at current base fee.
- check_token_approvals    Active approvals; surface dangerous ones.
- resolve_basename         Basename ↔ address, both directions.
- simulate_swap            Read-only quote (Uniswap V3 / Aerodrome).

MCP descriptor: https://basekit.dev/.well-known/mcp.json
Plugin manifest: https://basekit.dev/plugin.json
Aggregated playbook: https://basekit.dev/skill.md

## How to install (machine-readable)

claude:    claude plugin install basekit
cursor:    cursor mcp add basekit
codex:     codex mcp add basekit npx -- -y @basekit/mcp
windsurf:  windsurf mcp add basekit
manual:    git clone https://github.com/basekit/basekit && cd basekit && ./install.sh

## Rate limits

basekit.dev is static. No rate limits on the docs.
The MCP server is self-hosted by the caller; no central rate limit applies.
